They dig deep into the middle-market and private credit universe, covering deal profiles, spread premiums,

title: Gilts, Sterling Correlation Underscores UK Vulnerabilities
title_cn: 英国国债与英镑的相关性凸显了英国的脆弱性
summary:
Keir Starmer’s government vowed to protect the UK against external and economic threats in a King’s Speech that majored on security even as the prime minister faces a potential challenge to his own leadership.
Jane Foley, Head of FX Strategy at RaboBank, explains how the UK's political uncertainty is impacting the currency market, following King Charles' address to parliament. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Nears Record High on Tight Global Supply; Aluminum Surges
title_cn: 全球供应紧张，铜价接近历史新高；铝价飙升
summary: Copper extended gains above $14,000 a ton, inching toward a record set in late January, as supply risks mount from mine disruptions around the world. Aluminum surged to the highest in more than four years.

title: Dish Soap and Flip-Flops Turn Political in Polarized Brazil
title_cn: 洗碗皂和人字拖在两极分化的巴西变得政治化
summary: Five months before a presidential election, Brazil’s most heated political debate is a fight over dish soap.

title: Bharti to Boost Airtel Africa Stake in $2.9 Billion Deal
title_cn: 巴蒂将在价值 29 亿美元的交易中增持 Airtel Africa 股份
summary: Bharti Airtel Ltd. will boost its stake in its UK-listed African subsidiary through a $2.9 billion share swap, before a planned initial public offering of the unit’s mobile-money business.

title: Golub Capital Names Co-CEO, Co-Presidents for First Time
title_cn: Golub Capital 首次任命联席首席执行官和联席总裁
summary: Alternative asset manager Golub Capital is promoting its president, David Golub, to co-chief executive officer alongside his brother Lawrence Golub.

title: Bonds Fall as Inflation Pickup Fuels Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 通胀回升加剧美联储加息押注，债券下跌：市场结束
summary: A resurgence in inflation sent bonds lower on concern the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer, with a war-driven surge in energy costs threatening to ripple through other parts of the economy.

title: Swiss Say Nuclear Plants Are Economically Viable for 80 Years
title_cn: 瑞士称核电站在经济上可持续运行 80 年
summary: Switzerland said its nuclear power plants in Goesgen and Leibstadt can profitably run for as long as 80 years, two decades beyond previous projections.

title: Equinox Gold Agrees to Buy Orla Mining in $5.1 Billion Deal
title_cn: Equinox Gold 同意以 51 亿美元收购 Orla Mining
summary: Equinox Gold Corp. agreed to acquire Canada’s Orla Mining Ltd. for about $5.1 billion, the latest in a wave of gold-mining deals as producers seek to boost output and reserves after a massive price rally in bullion over the past year.

title: Stegra and Its Lenders Agree to Unlock €1.5 Billion Debt Funding
title_cn: Stegra 及其贷款人同意解锁 15 亿欧元债务融资
summary: Stegra AB has agreed with creditors to unlock about €1.5 billion ($1.8 billion) of undrawn credit lines which, together with recently secured equity funding, will help complete what will be the world’s biggest green-steel plant.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/13/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 13 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Slips as US Inflation Resurgence Raises Odds of Fed Hike
title_cn: 由于美国通胀复苏增加美联储加息的可能性，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as the latest US data showed a resurgence in inflation, reinforcing bets that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for an extended period of time.

title: Bond Investors Flee as Inflation Worry Sends Yields to 2026 High
title_cn: 通胀担忧导致收益率升至 2026 年高位，债券投资者纷纷逃离
summary: Investors are fleeing government bonds after back-to-back US inflation reports this week showed mounting price pressures, sending benchmark interest rates to the highest levels in nearly a year.

title: Alibaba, Tencent Fall Short of Expectations for Big AI Payoff
title_cn: 阿里巴巴和腾讯的人工智能回报未能达到预期
summary: China’s twin leaders in artificial intelligence reported revenue that fell short of estimates, signaling the challenges in translating higher spending on AI into faster growth.

title: Oil Holds Steady on Mideast Impasse and Shrinking Inventories
title_cn: 中东僵局和库存减少，石油保持稳定
summary: Oil largely held its 8% surge over the past three sessions as Middle East tensions simmer and global stockpiles shrink at a record pace.

title: Polymarket Trading Volume Declines for First Time Since August
title_cn: Polymarket 交易量自 8 月以来首次下降
summary: Trading volume on Polymarket has declined for the first time in eight months, a setback that comes as its founder acknowledges missteps and its chief rival Kalshi Inc. continues to grow.

title: Chinese Tanker Set to Test US Hormuz Naval Blockade
title_cn: 中国油轮将测试美国霍尔木兹海军封锁
summary: A Chinese-owned supertanker hauling Iraqi crude through the Persian Gulf is set to test the US blockade over the next 24 hours as it attempts to exit the largely shuttered Strait of Hormuz. The transit would coincide with President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing.

title: BlackRock Expects Increased Downgrades for State Borrowers
title_cn: 贝莱德预计国家借款人的评级将进一步下调
summary: The market for state and local government debt is becoming “less forgiving,” according to BlackRock Inc.’s Pat Haskell, who leads the firm’s municipal bond group.

title: Nvidia Gains on China Trip; Softbank Up on Quarterly Profit Beat | Stock Movers
title_cn: 英伟达中国行获利；软银季度利润增长库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with John Tucker:

- Nvidia (NVDA) shares are higher on news CEO Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes Beijing summit.
- Nebius Group (NBIS) is moving this morning as it reported revenue for the first quarter that beat the average analyst estimate.
- SoftBank (SFTBY) is up after it reported a surge in quarterly profit due to valuation gains on its OpenAI investment. The gains on OpenAI outweighed lackluster investment gains elsewhere in the Tokyo-based technology group’s portfolio while war in the Middle East roiled markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Agnico Eagle Plans $10 Billion Investment in Ontario Gold Assets
title_cn: Agnico Eagle 计划投资 100 亿美元投资安大略省黄金资产
summary: Agnico Eagle Mines Ltd. said it will invest about C$14 billion ($10.2 billion) in Ontario, which the province says is one of the biggest ever private sector commitments in its mining industry.

title: Skechers Ups Offer to Hedge Funds Challenging Price of 3G Buyout
title_cn: Skechers 向对冲基金提出收购要约，挑战 3G 收购价格
summary: Skechers USA Inc. increased its offer to resolve a lawsuit brought by hedge funds and other investors challenging 3G Capital’s $9.4 billion purchase of the footwear maker after settlement talks failed last year, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Goeasy Launches Plan to Thwart Takeover Bids After Stock’s 76% Plunge
title_cn: Goeasy 股价暴跌 76% 后推出阻止收购要约的计划
summary: Subprime lender Goeasy Ltd. adopted a shareholder rights plan as its results showed more consumer credit strain. The shares fell.

title: JPMorgan Reshuffles Investment Bank Leadership
title_cn: 摩根大通重组投资银行领导层
summary: JPMorgan Chase named Dorothee Blessing, Kevin Foley and Jared Kaye as co-heads of its global investment banking business. Katherine Doherty has more on the shakeup on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PE-Owned Insurers Boosting Private Credit Holdings, Study Finds
title_cn: 研究发现，私募股权保险公司正在增加私人信贷持有量
summary: Life insurance companies owned by private equity firms have quietly reshaped their portfolios, piling into higher-yielding alternative credit in a shift that’s entangled the industry with the broader financial system, according to researchers at the Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago.

title: Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Jetties Empty Again Yesterday, Satellite Shows
title_cn: 卫星显示，伊朗哈格岛石油码头昨天再次空空如也
summary: The oil jetties at Iran’s Kharg Island were once again empty on Tuesday, curbing the nation’s ability to export crude, satellite images collected by Bloomberg show.

title: Lone Star-Owned German Bank IKB Is Exposed to Collapse of UK Mortgage Firm MFS
title_cn: 孤星旗下的德国银行 IKB 面临英国抵押贷款公司 MFS 倒闭的风险
summary: A German bank owned by US investment firm Lone Star Funds is among the growing list of lenders exposed to Market Financial Solutions Ltd., the latest example of how the local UK firm’s collapse has spilled across foreign credit markets.

title: Nvidia's CEO Is a Late Add to Trump's China Trip
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官迟到加入特朗普中国之行
summary: President Donald Trump invited Nvidia co-founder Jensen Huang to join him on his trip to China at the last minute. This brings AI and chips into the spotlight. Tim Cook and Elon Musk also went along. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern is traveling with the president and reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Family Offices Build Stake in Miner After Stock Soars 900%
title_cn: 矿业公司股价飙升 900% 后家族办公室增持股份
summary: For decades, the risky world of early-stage mining ventures was the playground of institutional funds and commodity trading houses. But after a more than 900% rally in a little-known Canadian potash developer last year, a new class of investors is moving in: family offices.

title: Nvidia Chips, Boeing Jets: Stock Traders Focus on Trump in China
title_cn: 英伟达芯片、波音喷气式飞机：股票交易员关注特朗普在中国的表现
summary: An upcoming meeting between US President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping could be the next test for stocks that are clocking one record after the next.

title: Arm, SoftBank Said to Have Tried to Buy Cerebras
title_cn: Arm、软银据说曾试图收购 Cerebras
summary: Arm Holdings and SoftBank Group made an approach to acquire Cerebras Systems weeks before its expected initial public offering, which was rebuffed. Bailey Lipschultz has more on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Survey Shows More Job Anxiety, Widespread Price Concerns
title_cn: 美联储调查显示更多的就业焦虑和普遍的价格担忧
summary: The vast majority of Americans worried about high prices in 2025, and a growing share grew anxious about the job market too, according to an annual Federal Reserve survey.

title: Arm, SoftBank Tried to Buy Cerebras in 11th Hour
title_cn: Arm、软银试图在第 11 个小时内收购 Cerebras
summary: Arm Holdings Plc and majority owner SoftBank Group Corp. made an approach to acquire Cerebras Systems Inc., the AI computing firm, weeks before its expected initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AI Startup Fractile Raises $220 Million for Chip Production
title_cn: AI 初创公司 Fractile 融资 2.2 亿美元用于芯片生产
summary: Fractile, a UK startup designing chips to handle artificial intelligence workloads, has raised $220 million to help produce its first processors.

title: Mistral Developing New AI Model for Banks Lacking Mythos Access
title_cn: Mistral 为缺乏神话访问权限的银行开发新的人工智能模型
summary: French artificial intelligence startup Mistral AI is in discussions with European banks about deploying its answer to Anthropic PBC’s Mythos, the limited-access AI model that can uncover cybersecurity vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed and scale.

title: CATL-Linked Investors to Buy VNET Stake in $942 Million Deal
title_cn: 宁德时代相关投资者将以 9.42 亿美元的交易收购 VNET 股份
summary: Companies linked to China’s battery giant Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. agreed to buy up to a 38% stake in Chinese data center operator VNET Group Inc. from an existing shareholder, in a deal that could be valued at up to $942 million.

title: Bank of Canada Sees AI as Possible Productivity Salve
title_cn: 加拿大银行将人工智能视为可能的生产力救星
summary: The Bank of Canada struck an optimistic tone on the economic impact of artificial intelligence, arguing that widespread adoption of the technology will boost the country’s ailing productivity without significant job losses.

title: How the Hormuz Crisis Could Disrupt the Internet’s Backbone
title_cn: 霍尔木兹危机如何扰乱互联网的骨干
summary:
Underneath the world's oceans, miles and miles of fiber optic-cables send packets of information from one location to the next, powering the internet as we know it. So what happens when a major natural event — or a war — threatens this vital infrastructure?

Samanth Subramanian, author of The Web Beneath the Waves: The Fragile Cables that Connect Our World, joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss how the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz can disrupt the backbone of the internet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s LinkedIn Is Cutting Jobs in Latest Industry Cull
title_cn: 微软 LinkedIn 正在最新行业裁员中裁员
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s LinkedIn is cutting workers in the tech industry’s latest move to reduce headcount in the AI age.

title: Schwab Will Use AI To Serve Less-Affluent Customers
title_cn: 施瓦布将利用人工智能为不太富裕的客户提供服务
summary: Charles Schwab Corp. is planning to use artificial intelligence to extend benefits usually reserved for wealthy clients to the less affluent. CEO Rick Wurster said AI will be a "real accelerant" for the 55-year-old firm. He spoke with Carlyle Group Co-Founder and Co-Chairman David Rubenstein for an upcoming episode of Bloomberg Wealth. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nebius Reports 684% Sales Jump on AI Data Center Growth
title_cn: Nebius 报告人工智能数据中心增长带动销售额增长 684%
summary: Cloud computing provider Nebius Group NV reported a 684% jump in first quarter sales on increased demand for its data centers.

title: Nuclear Power’s Second Revolution Needs More Fuel
title_cn: 核电的第二次革命需要更多燃料
summary: New reactors with new designs mean new uranium mines and new production. Bloomberg Primer explores whether the industry can keep up with demand.

title: Amazon Puts Alexa Inside the Shopping Search Bar in AI Push
title_cn: 亚马逊将 Alexa 纳入人工智能推送的购物搜索栏
summary: Artificial intelligence algorithms are coming to some of the most valuable real estate in retail: the Amazon.com Inc. search bar.

title: Principal’s Shah Says Tech Is Haven Trade in a ‘Fragile’ Market
title_cn: 校长沙阿表示，科技是“脆弱”市场中的避风港贸易
summary: Big tech stocks are proving to be a safe bet for equity investors looking for a harbor in a “fragile” market brought about by the Iran war, according to Seema Shah at Principal Asset Management.

title: Indonesia Ex-Minister Makarim Faces 18 Years in Jail in Chromebooks Case
title_cn: 印度尼西亚前部长 Makarim 因 Chromebook 案面临 18 年监禁
summary: Indonesian prosecutors demanded an 18-year prison sentence for former education minister and Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim, bringing a months-long graft trial closer to a verdict for the man who built the country’s most valuable tech startup.

title: Principal: Investors to Stay Focused on Tech
title_cn: 原则：投资者将继续关注科技
summary: Seema Shah, chief global strategist at Principal Asset Management, says technology is “likely to continue to be the favorite” in markets. “People want to build up exposure, they want to keep creating this buildup in AI technology,” Shah adds. She also warns of vulnerability should the conflict in the Middle East continue to disrupt shipping. Shah speaks on Bloomberg Television.

title: Insider One Buys Bluecore in AI Marketing Drive Ahead of IPO
title_cn: Insider One 在 IPO 前收购 Bluecore，推动人工智能营销
summary: Istanbul-based startup Insider One bought Bluecore Inc to expand its US reach in artificial intelligence marketing ahead of a planned initial public offering.

title: Poland Stands By Digital Services Tax Plan, Rebuffing US Threats
title_cn: 波兰支持数字服务税收计划，拒绝美国威胁
summary: Poland will continue working on legislation to tax digital platforms, Finance Minister Andrzej Domanski said, despite threats of retaliation from the US administration of Donald Trump.

title: SoftBank Profit Jumps After Emboldened Son Bets More on OpenAI
title_cn: 儿子大胆押注 OpenAI，软银利润大幅增长
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. reported a surge in quarterly profit due to valuation gains on its OpenAI investment, boosting confidence at the Japanese company to bet even more on the ChatGPT maker.

title: Samsung and SK Hynix Still Look Like Bargains Compared to Tech Peers
title_cn: 与科技同行相比，三星和 SK 海力士看起来仍然很划算
summary: South Korea’s top two companies have enthralled the nation but may still be underestimated

title: Undersea Internet Cable Projects Are Getting Tangled in the Iran War
title_cn: 海底互联网电缆项目陷入伊朗战争
summary: If construction ever resumes in the Persian Gulf, tech companies will have a new headache to deal with: Unexploded missiles and mines.

title: Jack Ma-Backed Ant’s Profit Fell 79% on AI, Health Care Costs
title_cn: 马云支持的蚂蚁金服利润因人工智能和医疗保健成本下降 79%
summary: Ant Group Co.’s quarterly profit continued to decline after the company increased investment in artificial intelligence technology for its health care, large language model and payment services.

title: Even Silicon Valley’s Congressman Wants to Rein in AI
title_cn: 就连硅谷国会议员也想控制人工智能
summary: Ro Khanna spent years cheering on the tech industry and building ties with wealthy donors. Now he’s pitching himself as a presidential contender with a wealth tax and tough talk about the “Epstein class.”

title: Lake Tahoe Power Crunch Shows AI’s Growing Energy Toll in West
title_cn: 太浩湖电力紧缺表明人工智能对西部地区的能源损失不断增加
summary: Lake Tahoe has long been a refuge for Silicon Valley’s tech elite, from Mark Zuckerberg to Larry Ellison. Now the artificial intelligence boom behind much of that wealth is straining the region’s power market, pushing up costs for residents in the lakeside towns below.

title: Korean Technocrat Sparks Debate Over ‘Citizen Dividend’ From AI
title_cn: 韩国技术官僚引发关于人工智能“公民红利”的争论
summary: A veteran Korean technocrat who built a reputation for handling financial turmoil posted a late-night essay about how the country should use a potential record-breaking tax haul from the AI boom. Soon after the market opened the next morning, it started tanking.

title: Metis TechBio Shares Jump 127% as Hot HK Debuts Extend Run
title_cn: Metis TechBio 股价大涨 127%，香港上市热潮延续
summary: Shares of Metis TechBio Co, a biotechnology company using artificial intelligence to deliver and formulate drugs, jumped 127% in their Hong Kong debut on Wednesday, adding to a string of first-day pops in the city.

title: Tencent’s Revenue Miss Heightens Pressure for Faster AI Payoff
title_cn: 腾讯的营收未达预期加大了人工智能更快回报的压力
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. reported its slowest revenue growth in six quarters, underscoring the urgency around its costly AI pivot while core businesses like games and advertising show signs of age.

title: Srinivasan Pitches Crypto Startup School to Malaysian Officials
title_cn: Srinivasan 向马来西亚官员推介加密货币初创学校
summary: Serial tech investor Balaji Srinivasan is attempting to forge closer ties to politicians in Malaysia, wooing them with a showcase of his startup school project and calling for policies that would support it.

title: South Korea’s AI Boom Sparks Wealth Debate
title_cn: 韩国的人工智能繁荣引发财富争论
summary:
South Korea is at the center of a wealth debate about a “citizen dividend” using taxes on AI profits.

This comes amid a profit boom in the AI-tech space, as Korea’s stock market rallies, beating markets around the world. Bloomberg TV’s David Ingles reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos Calls for Calm as Shots Ring Out at Philippine Senate
title_cn: 菲律宾参议院枪声响起 马科斯呼吁保持冷静
summary: Gunshots were fired at the Philippine Senate on Wednesday evening where a lawmaker wanted by the International Criminal Court has sought refuge. President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. called for calm and denied any government involvement in the incident.

title: At China Summit, Trump Has CEOs, But Xi Has Leverage
title_cn: 在中国峰会上，特朗普有首席执行官，但习近平有影响力
summary: The Iran war pulls US attention away from the key agenda of trade, tech and Taiwan.

title: Farage Faces Inquiry Into £5 Million From Crypto Investor
title_cn: Farage 面临加密货币投资者 500 万英镑的质询
summary: The UK’s parliamentary standards commissioner launched an inquiry into whether Nigel Farage breached the House of Commons Code of Conduct by failing to declare a £5 million ($6.8 million) gift from Christopher Harborne.

title: Germany Weighs €3 Billion in Subsidy Cuts to Ease Budget Strain
title_cn: 德国考虑削减 30 亿欧元补贴以缓解预算紧张
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition agreed to scale back subsides worth about €3 billion ($3.5 billion) to create fiscal space for tax relief for lower-income households, according to people familiar with the discussions.

title: Starmer Rival Streeting Prepares to Resign and Challenge Prime Minister
title_cn: 斯塔默的竞争对手斯特里廷准备辞职并挑战总理
summary: The UK’s governing Labour Party was headed for a divisive battle over the country’s top political office, as a leading Cabinet member prepared to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

title: Gunshots Ring Out in the Philippine Senate Building
title_cn: 菲律宾参议院大楼响起枪声
summary: Gunshots could be heard inside the Philippine Senate on Wednesday evening. A lawmaker wanted by the International Criminal Court has been living in the complex since Monday. Senator Ronald Dela Rosa is wanted for his alleged role in crimes related to a deadly crackdown on illegal drugs. The country's interior secretary said no one was hit or wounded by the gunshots.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia’s CEO Joins Trump in China With AI in the Spotlight
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官与特朗普一起访问中国，人工智能成为人们关注的焦点
summary:
Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes Beijing summit.
Annmarie Hordern, Bloomberg Surveillance TV Co-Host, discusses the President's trip and why several US business leaders will be in attendance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sheinbaum Denies That CIA Agents Are Operating in Mexico
title_cn: 谢因鲍姆否认中央情报局特工在墨西哥活动
summary: Mexico’s President Claudia Sheinbaum refuted a report that the US Central Intelligence Agency helped assassinate cartel members in Mexican territory earlier this year with an explosive hidden in a car.

title: Marcos Says Government Not Involved as Gunshots Heard in Senate
title_cn: 马科斯表示参议院听到枪声时政府没有参与
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. said the government was not involved in an incident where gunshots were heard at the Senate building late Wednesday.

title: Trump Lands in China for Xi Trade Summit With Iran War in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普抵达中国参加习近平贸易峰会，伊朗战争悬而未决
summary: President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for the first state visit to China by a US leader in nine years, as the world’s two largest economies look to stabilize ties with a summit playing out against the backdrop of the Iran war.

title: Lula Scraps Hated Small Import Tax Ahead of Brazil Election
title_cn: 卢拉在巴西大选前取消令人讨厌的小额进口税
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva scrapped a tax on imports valued at $50 or less, a measure likely to boost his popularity less than five months before the election.

title: Volkswagen, Rafael Near Deal For Iron Dome Production in Germany
title_cn: 大众汽车和拉斐尔即将达成协议在德国生产铁穹
summary: Volkswagen AG and Israeli defense manufacturer Rafael Advanced Defense Systems are nearing a deal to form a joint venture until the end of the year to produce parts of the Iron Dome air defense system in Germany.

title: UK's Streeting Set to Resign and Challenge PM Starmer
title_cn: 英国斯特里廷将辞职并挑战首相斯塔默
summary: UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting is preparing to resign from the government and challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for the leadership, according to his allies. Streeting, who met Starmer briefly in Downing Street on Wednesday morning, is likely to quit the cabinet this week and attempt to trigger a leadership contest, they said, requesting anonymity to disclose private deliberations. Bloomberg's Jonathan Ferro and Lisa Abramowicz discuss the development, which was first reported by The Times. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Court Sentences Nigerian Politician to 75 Years in Jail for Graft
title_cn: 尼日利亚政客因贪污罪被法院判处 75 年监禁
summary: A Nigerian court handed a former energy minister a 75-year jail term after finding him guilty of money laundering and corruption linked to two power projects in the West African nation, which has persistently been roiled by outages.

title: Italian Emerges as Frontrunner for Bosnia-Herzegovina Envoy Post
title_cn: 意大利成为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那特使职位的领跑者
summary: A veteran Italian diplomat has emerged as the front-runner to succeed Christian Schmidt as the top international envoy to Bosnia-Herzegovina.

title: Trump, Xi to Meet for High-Stakes US-China Summit
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平将举行高风险的美中峰会
summary: US President Donald Trump has arrived in Beijing for his first China visit in a decade, seeking to press Xi Jinping on trade and the Iran war. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Le Pen’s Party Searches Europe for Loans After French Banks Balk
title_cn: 法国银行犹豫不决后，勒庞的政党在欧洲寻找贷款
summary: Four years after traveling to Hungary to negotiate a campaign loan for Marine Le Pen, her party’s treasurer is once again searching across Europe for financing.

title: Trump Lands in Beijing for Trade Summit With China's Xi Jinping
title_cn: 特朗普抵达北京与中国国家主席习近平举行贸易峰会
summary: President Donald Trump flew overnight from the US and arrived in Beijing for a state visit to China, where he will meet Chinese President Xi Jinping at the Great Hall of the People. Trump was greeted by Chinese Vice President Han Zheng, a military honor guard, and hundreds of flag-waving children at the airport.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Arrives in China For High-Stakes Meeting With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普抵达中国与习近平进行重要会晤
summary:
President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for the first state visit to China by a US leader in nine years, as the world’s two largest economies look to stabilize ties with a summit playing out against the backdrop of the Iran war.
Air Force One touched down at the Beijing Capital International Airport slightly before 8 p.m. on Wednesday, where Chinese Vice President Han Zheng, a military honor guard, and hundreds of flag-waving children readied a red-carpet greeting ceremony for the US president. Minmin Low, China correspondent for Bloomberg News joined Bloomberg to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Vows Security in King’s Speech With Own Job at Risk
title_cn: 斯塔默在国王的演讲中誓言自己的工作面临风险
summary: Keir Starmer’s government vowed to protect the UK against external and economic threats in a King’s Speech that majored on security even as the prime minister faces a potential challenge to his own leadership.

title: Nvidia’s CEO Joins Trump in China With AI in the Spotlight
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官与特朗普一起访问中国，人工智能成为人们关注的焦点
summary: Nvidia Corp. co-founder Jensen Huang joined US President Donald Trump on his visit to China as a last-minute addition, thrusting AI and technology into the spotlight before a high-stakes Beijing summit.

title: Swiss Population Cap Study Shows 12% GDP Hit by End of Century
title_cn: 瑞士人口上限研究显示，到本世纪末，GDP 将下降 12%
summary: A Swiss population cap of 10 million risks curbing economic output by as much as 12% through the end of the century, according to a government-commissioned study.

title: Gulf States to Win NATO Summit Invites With Iran War on Agenda
title_cn: 海湾国家赢得北约峰会邀请，伊朗战争列入议程
summary: The North Atlantic Treaty Organization is planning to invite representative from four Gulf states to the summit in Ankara with the Iran war and the transatlantic rift likely to loom large over the talks, said people familiar with the matter.

title: Merz Coalition Draws Up Road Map for German Reforms by July
title_cn: 梅尔茨联盟将于七月前制定德国改革路线图
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s coalition broke a deadlock on energy and resolved to push through a broader set of reform measures by parliamentary recess in July after a meeting aimed at regaining momentum.

title: Trump Looks for Deals in Push to ‘Open Up’ China
title_cn: 特朗普寻求达成协议以推动中国“开放”
summary: The president lands in Beijing with a crew of tech giants and business execs in tow

title: UK to Fast-Track Plans to Align With EU Rules in New Bill
title_cn: 英国将在新法案中快速制定与欧盟规则保持一致的计划
summary: The UK will introduce legislation to fast-track the adoption of EU rules with less parliamentary scrutiny, a move that would allow Prime Minister Keir Starmer to deepen ties with Brussels but which risks angering voters who supported Brexit.

title: Lula Retakes Slim Lead Over Flavio Bolsonaro Before Brazil Vote
title_cn: 巴西投票前卢拉以微弱优势重新领先弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva and Senator Flavio Bolsonaro are neck and neck ahead of Brazil’s October election, with a new poll giving the incumbent a slight edge.

title: Starmer Allies Say He’ll Fight Any Challenge by UK Rival Streeting
title_cn: 斯塔默盟友称他将应对英国竞争对手街头的任何挑战
summary: Keir Starmer Photographer: Jason Alden/Bloomberg
